reasoning: First, I will increase R1 to observe if the total resistance changes accordingly.

Since increasing R1 from 10.0 to 20.0 resulted in the total resistance increasing from 15.0 to 25.0, it suggests that the resistors are connected in series. I will now decrease R1 to confirm this hypothesis.

The total resistance returned to 15.0 when R1 was decreased from 20.0 to 10.0, confirming that the resistors are indeed in series. The total resistance in a series circuit is the sum of the individual resistances.
